brandBar.subtitle: World-class fixtures and artisanal craft, curated under one roof in San Miguel de Allende.

shopByRoom.title: Find Your Fixtures
shopByRoom.subtitle: Whether you're renovating a bathroom, upgrading a kitchen, or selecting hardware for a new build — we have it.

founderStory.title: Where Two Worlds Meet
founderStory.paragraph1: In 2004, Roger Williams opened a small showroom in San Miguel de Allende with a radical idea: a single destination where architects could source world-class brands like Kohler, TOTO, and Brizo — and commission one-of-a-kind pieces from Mexico's finest artisans.
founderStory.paragraph2: Twenty years later, Counter Cultures remains the only showroom in the region bridging international precision engineering with the soul of Mexican craft. Every fixture is personally curated. Every artisan is a partner, not a supplier.

artisanal.title: Handcrafted by Mexico's Master Artisans
artisanal.paragraph: Hand-hammered copper basins from Santa Clara del Cobre. Stone vessels carved from cantera rosa. Ceramic sinks painted in centuries-old Talavera tradition. Each piece carries the marks of its maker — and a story no factory can replicate.

tradeTeaser.title: The Trade Program
tradeTeaser.subtitle: Architects, designers, and builders get dedicated pricing, specification support, and priority fulfillment on every brand we carry.

testimonial.quote: Counter Cultures transformed our project. Roger understood the vision immediately — he specified Brizo for the kitchen, TOTO for the guest baths, and then surprised us with a hand-hammered copper basin from a local artisan that became the centerpiece of the master suite. No other showroom in Mexico could have done that.
testimonial.author: Arq. Carolina Mendoza
testimonial.role: Principal, Studio Arquitectura MX · San Miguel de Allende

contactCTA.title: Visit the Showroom
contactCTA.responseTime: We respond within 2 hours during business hours.

newsletter.title: Design Inspiration, Delivered
newsletter.subtitle: Trends, new arrivals, and artisan spotlights. Monthly, never spammy.
